standardRows.reason: All rows 0-8 used animation cells preserve exact alpha geometry, silhouettes, registration, used/unused occupancy, frame order, and state semantics. The single approved final despill changes only edge-local RGB while preserving alpha.

neutralCell.reason: Approved assembler neutral paste strengthens 2468 translucent alpha values in special row0c6, but visible support and bbox remain exactly 27,5,165,203 and normal-size appearance is unchanged. This cell is not one of the six idle animation frames.

preservedFeatures: round black face and green eyes
irregular white nose and muzzle blaze
broad white chest with narrow belly extension
solid black back and compact legs
photorealistic fur texture and calm expression
lookRows.reason: Rows 9-10 form one matched-scale seated look family. Head/eye direction changes while the planted lower body, adult proportions, baseline, palette, markings, and tail construction remain stable.
